const inter = Inter({
  subsets: ['latin'],
  va... [truncated for AI, original length: 649]

# Domains
Heart of the application containing business rules only.

# Modules
Every feature becomes a module. Modules own UI, logic, tests, and infra.

# Shared
Reusable types, utilities, and components.

# Infrastructure
External implementations and adapters (database, cache, logger).

# Services
Cross-domain services.

# Integrations
Third-party APIs (Stripe, OpenAI, Google).

# Data
Schemas, migrations, seed, and cache.

# Resources
Locales, templates, themes.

# Assets
Images, audio, video.

# Configurations
No hardcoded values config files.

# Scripts
Build, deploy, lint, format scripts.

# Tests
Global testing setup.

# Deployment
Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform.

# Documentation
Architecture and API documentation.

# Metadata
project.json, architecture.json.

# Tools
CLI tools and helper scripts.

# Workspace
Exports, artifacts, and temp files.
